$comment: The environment registry — the machine-readable twin of docs/CONTROLS-REGISTER.md. Every control acting on this work, by layer and owner. A future env-audit checks reality against this file the way the doctor checks the harness against manifest.json. Documented, not yet enforced (Stage 2).

controls.does: Pins git committer to Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>; sets core.hooksPath to a CCR path with passthrough stubs
Blocks turn-end unless tree is committed AND pushed AND signature-verified

L2_environment.owner: Remote environment configuration (set at env creation / task setup)

controls.does: GitHub access scoped to jeremy-james-state/os only; blocks other repos and repo creation
Outbound HTTPS only via the agent proxy

controls.value: claude/harness-schema-governance-esux5d (NOTE: clean lineage actually lives on claude/os-bootstrap — see branching decision pending)

controls.does: Destructive commands (rm -rf, git push --force, git reset --hard) denied
Runs doctor + governance-check + structure-check + tests on every PR/push
Claude acts as claude[bot] via the GitHub App when @claude is mentioned on issues/PRs (see governance/decisions/identity.md)

Upserts record/signals.jsonl to Supabase os_signals on push (signal-ledger CANDIDATE transport). DORMANT (gov-031): signals.jsonl is now gitignored so this never triggers; kept as a reference for the future Data-Layer transport
controls.egress: Supabase os_signals (full signal incl. summary text) — not currently firing

controls.does: Owner review required for harness/ + governance/ + docs/BOUNDARY.md
Repo-managed git hooks (pre-push laws, away-gate, etc.)
controls.state: NOT present in this OS v2 repo; they live only in the legacy local Mac checkout and do NOT fire here

currentSnapshot.$comment: Audited live in this container 2026-06-30. The answer to 'what hooks are running?'
currentSnapshot.repoLevelHooks: none — this OS v2 repo defines no .claude settings, no .mcp.json, no git hooks of its own
currentSnapshot.keyClarity: The hooks you 'lost track of' are in the legacy ~/Projects/OS Mac checkout. This clean remote container carries none of them. The OS v2 hook/control set is a deliberate choice still to be made, not an inheritance to untangle.
